fields.label: Access Token
fields.helpText: Go to Attio -> Settings -> Developers -> API Access -> Generate a new token

healthcheck_config.description: Validates access token via Attio /v2/self endpoint

metadata.summary: Attio next-gen CRM for managing people, companies, deals, and custom objects via the Attio API v2.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Log in to Attio.
2. Go to Settings -> Developers -> API Access.
3. Click 'Generate a new token'.
4. Select the required scopes (read/write for records, lists, objects).
5. Copy the token and paste it here.
